title: Bitcoin as Social Technology
description: Bitcoin works through social consensus around rule enforcement, not just code execution. Like contracts, the social layer determines legitimacy when disputes or edge cases appear.

resources.title: Block Size War
resources.notes: Historical case of social coordination shaping protocol path.

resources.notes: Primary source showing node-driven social enforcement.
